TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Seljupetje ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 59 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 38 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 59%, Amis 3%, Puyuma 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Seljupetje hya' ga Mulinaga. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seljupetje ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seljupetje ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēeljupetje …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu taznin …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%, pujuma *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēzil na s~…ēeljupetje ńßja Ē …£a mulina…£a. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč s~…ēeljupetje …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč s~…ēeljupetje …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Seljupetje ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 59 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 38 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 59%, Amis 3%, Puyuma 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Seljupetje hya' ga Mulinaga. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seljupetje ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seljupetje ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēeljupetje …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu taznin …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%, pujuma *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēzil na s~…ēeljupetje ńßja Ē …£a mulina…£a. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč s~…ēeljupetje …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč s~…ēeljupetje …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
